$comment: Winget-managed GUI/heavy apps for Windows machines. Applied by windows/apply.ps1 (the Windows analog of `switch`). Keep IDs exact (`winget search <name>` to find them). visualStudio is handled specially: edition is a machine/licensing decision, workloads live in vs2026.vsconfig.

packages.note: Owns the JetBrains IDE fleet (IDEA, GoLand, CLion, DataGrip, ...). IDE installs/updates happen inside Toolbox, not winget.
Node LTS on the Windows side for JetBrains/VS tooling (WSL gets node via nix/homebrew equivalents).
PowerShell 7.x (pwsh). apply.ps1 -Upgrade keeps it on latest stable.
Second-brain vault UI. Vault: R:\Git.Local\KofTwentyTwo\second-brain (see docs/PLAN-secondbrain.md).

visualStudio.$commentEdition: Community | Professional | Enterprise -> winget id Microsoft.VisualStudio.<edition>. Override per-run with apply.ps1 -VSEdition.
